data.title: Coherent Introduces Thermadite Liquid Cold Plates for High-Power Compute Applications
data.description: Coherent has introduced Thermadite™ 800 Liquid Cold Plates (LCP) for advanced AI accelerator cooling, catering to the increasing demand for efficient cooling solutions in the growing AI industry.

data.title: Caribou Biosciences Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Provides Business Update
data.description: In Berkeley, California on March 5, 2026, Caribou Biosciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRBU), a prominent clinical-stage CRISPR genome-editing biopharmaceutical firm, disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. Additionally, the company shared key corporate achievements from recent times.

data.title: CarParts.com Q4 Earnings Report: What Investors Need to Know
data.description: CarParts.com (NASDAQ: PRTS) released its Q4 earnings on Thursday, March 5, 2026, at 04:01 PM, exceeding estimated earnings by 29.17%. The reported EPS was $-0.17, surpassing the estimated $-0.24. However, revenue dropped by $133.54 million compared to the previous year. In the preceding quarter, the company also outperformed expectations. For further details, refer to Benzinga.com.

data.title: Lineage Cell Therapeutics Q4 Earnings Summary & Key Takeaways
data.description: Lineage Cell Therapeutics (AMEX: LCTX) released its Q4 financial results on March 5, 2026, at 04:01 PM. The company exceeded expected earnings by 108.0% with an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.004, surpassing the estimated $-0.05. Revenue showed a $3.70 million increase compared to the previous year. For a detailed analysis, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Global Indemnity Group, LLC Announces Quarterly Distribution
data.description: On March 5, 2026, Global Indemnity Group, LLC (NASDAQ:GBLI) revealed that its Board of Directors sanctioned a dividend payout of $0.35 per common share. This distribution is scheduled to be disbursed on March 30, 2026, to all shareholders recorded as of the market closure on March 20, 2026.

data.title: Rumble releases Q4 and full-year 2025 financials, showcasing strong performance.
data.description: In the latest report, it was disclosed that the current unemployment rate stands at 4.2%, which is a decrease from the previous rate of 4.5%. The economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last month, surpassing analysts' expectations. This positive trend is attributed to growth in various sectors, including manufacturing, technology, and healthcare. Additionally, the average hourly wage saw a slight increase of 2.5%, signaling potential improvements in workers' income. Experts predict continued economic growth in the coming months, fueled by increased consumer spending and business investments.

data.title: AudioEye Earnings Review: Q4 Summary
data.description: AudioEye (NASDAQ: AEYE) released its Q4 earnings report on Thursday, March 5, 2026, at 04:01 PM. The report revealed that their earnings exceeded estimates by 37.5%, with an EPS of $0.22 compared to the expected $0.16. Additionally, their revenue saw an increase of $767 thousand from the previous year. For a detailed analysis of their past earnings, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Madrigal Pharmaceuticals Announces Grants of Inducement Awards under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: Madrigal Pharmaceuticals, Inc., based in Conshohocken, PA, disclosed on March 5, 2026, that it has granted equity awards to 20 new non-executive employees on March 1, 2026. These awards were given as equity inducement awards under Madrigal’s 2025 Inducement Plan. The granting of these equity awards was approved by Madrigal’s independent Compensation Committee in adherence to Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Madrigal Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: MDGL) is a biopharmaceutical company dedicated to developing innovative therapeutics for metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis (MASH).

data.title: Shareholder Alert: Ademi LLP Investigates Claims of Securities Fraud against Grocery Outlet Holding Corp.
data.description: A probe by Ademi LLP is underway to examine potential securities fraud accusations against Grocery Outlet (NASDAQ: GO) in Milwaukee as of March 5, 2026. The investigation is centered on alleged misleading statements by Grocery Outlet concerning its financial status, business activities, and future outlook.

data.title: SomerCor Expands Board of Directors, Emphasizing Strategic Partnerships
data.description: On March 5, 2026, Chicago-based SomerCor, a nonprofit organization recognized as a Certified Development Company (CDC) by the U.S. Small Business Administration, revealed the naming of Adrienne H. Baker, who holds an MBA, David Boulay, Ph.D., and LaVon M. Johns, Esq., to key positions within the company. SomerCor is known as a prominent provider of SBA 504 financing, offering crucial support to small businesses. This move marks a significant development for the company as it continues to strengthen its leadership team.

data.title: Ralliant Opens Global Headquarters in Raleigh, North Carolina
data.description: In Raleigh, North Carolina, Ralliant Corporation (NYSE: RAL) has inaugurated its global headquarters, a significant achievement in its inaugural year as an independent publicly traded entity. Situated in the North Hills region, the new headquarters strategically situates Ralliant within a prime technology and research hub in the United States. This move also grants Ralliant access to a proficient, educated workforce that aligns with the company's needs.

data.title: ERI Provides Zero Waste, Zero Emissions, Carbon Neutral ITAD and E-Waste Circularity Solutions in Fresno
data.description: In Fresno, California, ERI is a prominent material resource recovery, ITAD, and data destruction provider. They also hold the title of being the largest electronics recycler in the nation. ERI operates eight cutting-edge facilities that focus on achieving zero waste, zero emissions, and carbon neutrality in electronics reuse and recycling. Their headquarters in Fresno, established in 2002, is at the forefront of these efforts. Furthermore, ERI is certified with ISO 27001 and SOC 2 Type II standards, emphasizing their commitment to comprehensive electronic waste circularity services.

data.title: In HelloNation, Preschool Expert Abigail Coghlan Discusses Why Character Development Belongs in the Classroom
data.description: On March 5, 2026, in Spring Hill, Tennessee, Abigail Coghlan from Spring Hill Academy Preschool discussed in a HelloNation article the significance of character development in preschool and its impact on a child's future development. Coghlan highlighted the importance of integrating character building activities into early education. These efforts at Spring Hill Academy Preschool aim to lay a foundation for children's long-term growth and development.
